title: Ice And Fire Addon
description: This mod adds the dragon blood versions of the dragon bone tools
body:
This mod is a addon for the mod Ice And Fire.

It adds new weapons and tools, it also adds a new recipe for the create mod so you can automat your dragon meal


### **New Weapons/tools**

## Fire Dragon Blood Tools

- Flamed Dragon Bone Pickaxe
- Flamed Dragon Bone Axe 
- Flamed Dragon Bone Shovel
- Flamed Dragon Bone Hoe

## Ice Dragon Blood Tools

- Iced Dragon Bone Pickaxe
- Iced Dragon Bone Axe
- Iced Dragon Bone Shovel
- Iced Dragon Bone Hoe

## Lightning Dragon Bone Tools
  
- Lightning Dragon Bone Pickaxe
- Lightning Dragon Bone Axe
- Lightning Dragon Bone Shovel
- Lightning Dragon Bone Hoe

### **Any bugs found please join the discord**
